message:
fix(node): eliminate TOCTOU race and improve error audit trail

Two reliability fixes:

1. lockstep_harness.rs: Remove exists() pre-check before file
   operations, eliminating a time-of-check-to-time-of-use (TOCTOU)
   race condition. The file could be created/deleted between the
   check and the subsequent operation. Now handles the error from
   the operation itself. Also adds a regression test.

2. obligation_channel.rs: Replace silently-swallowed errors in
   obligation processing with explicit audit log entries. Failed
   obligations now emit structured events with the error details
   instead of being quietly dropped, making production debugging
   possible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
